TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tuwapun, title = Tuwapun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuwapun} }

S.FORM: alang Tuwapun ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,682 buwan, 4,170 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 816 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 3,354 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tuwapun hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tuwapun hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tuwapun hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Tuwapun hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Tuwapun hya' ga Ciku. tay 'zil na Tuwapun hya' ga Cikep. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tuwapun ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,682 buwan, 4,170 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 816 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 3,354 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Truku 2%, Bunun 2%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tuwapun hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tuwapun hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tuwapun hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Tuwapun hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Tuwapun hya' ga Ciku. tay 'zil na Tuwapun hya' ga Cikep. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tuwapun ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tuwapun ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tuwapun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tuwapun ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tuwapun ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tuwapun ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiku. taj ʔzil na tuwapun ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikep. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
